productDisplayName: Peter England Men Stripes Purple Shirt
description: Composition Purple and white striped shirt, made of a cotton blend fabric, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar with a buttoned front placket, patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hem Fitting Nuvo Wash care Wash separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach Drip dry Warm iron Designed to define your ensembles to perfection, this striped shirt from the Complement collection of peter england is crafted from a cotton blend fabric to offer wrinkle-free comfort, and is stitched to perfection making it a sure shot wardrobe favourite. Pair it with crisp formals, a blazer, a classy tie and accessories and rich leather formal shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
